name: gematikDirectory
title: gematik Directory
description: The gematik Directory Implementation Guide is based on FHIR Version R4 and defines the minimum conformance requirements for accessing the FHIR-Directory.

resource.name: CodeSystem for TI Institutions using OIDs
resource.description:
The codes for Institutions based on OIDs defined in gemSpec_OID 
We use a URN notation ([ProfessionOID from gemSpec_OID]). 
See also https://fachportal.gematik.de/fachportal-import/files/gemSpec_OID_V3.10.0.pdf

resource.name: CodeSystem for Practitioner's ProfessioiOid

We use a URN notation ([ProfessionOID from gemSpec_OID]). 
See also https://fachportal.gematik.de/fachportal-import/files/gemSpec_OID_V3.10.0.pdf
